calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Correct, Nunc Pro Tunc, The Application For And Renewal Of Judgment Filed On November 24, 2020
Off Calendar Apr-16-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF STEVEN ADAIR MACDONALD & ASSOCIATES, P.C.'s Motion To Correct, Nunc Pro Tunc, The Application For And Renewal Of Judgment Filed On November 24, 2020.

Plaintiff and Judgment Creditor Steven Adair MacDonald & Associates, P.C.'s Motion To Correct, Nunc Pro Tunc, The Application For And Renewal Of Judgment Filed On November 24, 2020, is GRANTED.

Good cause appearing, the court orders corrected nunc pro tunc the Application for and Renewal of Judgment filed on November 24, 2020 (the "Renewal"), of the judgment entered on December 1, 2010 (the "Judgment") against defendants/judgment debtors GREG NOTO aka GREGORY NOTO dba PLACE PIGALLE also dba MEDICI LOUNGE (collectively, "Judgment Debtors") by adding the date, county, and instrument number of the original Abstract of Judgment recorded with the San Francisco Recorder's Office on January 18, 2011. (See Code of Civil Procedure section 437(d).) The Corrected Application for and Renewal of Judgment ("Corrected Renewal") must be in the form submitted by Judgment Creditor concurrently with this motion as Exhibit F to the supporting declaration of Jessica Taran, sworn to on February 25, 2025. To effectuate the filing of the Corrected Renewal, Plaintiff and Judgment Creditor shall present the Corrected Renewal and this order to the clerk and the clerk shall enter a conforming Corrected Renewal, nunc pro tunc, as of November 24, 2020.

Prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and drop a hard paper copy in Dept. 302's inbox for the court's review and signature.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
